zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie於大約1373年出生時，他的父親Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar27歲，母親Isabel Ramsay24歲。他於1392年與Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth在蘇格蘭Forfarshire奧特豪斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年7月24日在英國蘇格蘭安格斯奧特豪斯享年49歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾音巴盧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie于大约1373年出生时，他的父亲Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar27岁，母亲Isabel Ramsay24岁。他于1392年与Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth在苏格兰Forfarshire奧特豪斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年7月24日在英国苏格兰安格斯奧特豪斯享年49岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾音巴盧利。

nameMeanings.name: Ogilvy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ogilvie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Oglesby  , a habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis (Angus), whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie was born about 1373, his father, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, was 27 and his mother, Isabel Ramsay, was 24. He married Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth in 1392, in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 July 1421, in Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland: Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie est né environ 1373, son père, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Ramsay, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth en 1392, à Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 juillet 1421, à Auchterhouse, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland: Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie um 1373 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar 27 und seine Mutter Isabel Ramsay 24. Er hat 1392 in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Juli 1421 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Auchterhouse, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie è nato il circa 1373, il suo padre, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Ramsay, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth nel 1392, nel Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 luglio 1421, nel Auchterhouse, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlieが約1373年に生まれた時，父Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfarは27歳，母Isabel Ramsayは24歳であった。1392年にスコットランドForfarshireアウチテローウゼでJanet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年7月24日にイギリススコットランドアンガスアウチテローウゼで49歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアインバーウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 커크턴 프 오트하스
ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie(이)가 대략 1373년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Ramsay(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1392년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 오트하스에서 Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 7월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 오트하스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 인베루리에 묻혔다.

pt.Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland: Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie nasceu aproximadamente 1373, seu pai, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Ramsay, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth em 1392, em Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de julho de 1421, em Auchterhouse, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland: кирктон оф аучтироус, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie родился около 1373 г., его отцу по имени Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Ramsay, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth в 1392 г. в местности аучтироус, Forfarshire, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 июля 1421 г. в местности аучтироус, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности инвирури, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie nació aproximadamente 1373, su papá, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel Ramsay, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth en 1392, en Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de julio de 1421, en Auchterhouse, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
